user.title: Yorkshire Water
user.description: Temporary development setup: paste a current Yorkshire Water portal session token or access token. Optional account and meter IDs can be supplied if known. Endpoint support is still being discovered, so sensors may remain unavailable until the API layer is completed.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Yorkshire Water
reauth_confirm.description: Paste a fresh Yorkshire Water portal session token or access token.

error.invalid_auth: Enter a valid session token or access token

abort.already_configured: This Yorkshire Water account or meter is already configured
